name: ctf-autopwn-orchestrator
description: Orchestrate CTF solving across local shell tools and a remote Kali API backend.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate local tmpfiles/bore with remote Kali API
interface.longDescription: Use local command-line tmpfiles and bore only for transfer/tunneling, then execute the full CTF workflow exclusively in remote Kali through https://api.zuens2020.work APIs.
defaultPrompt: Attachments and challenge URLs are local inputs only; transfer via tmpfiles, use bore for tunneling, and solve everything remotely in Kali through https://api.zuens2020.work
